title: Gadgets 'n Gizmos
description: A mod filled with assorted gadgets and gizmos
body:
NOW SUPPORTING FABRIC AND FORGE

 

Supported Versions: Most Popular Modding Versions

 

Discord: StyStatic's Gaming Gamers

 

A mod that adds Gadgets 'n Gizmos and Trinkets galore

 

This mod adds a multitude of uniquely interesting and powerful items, from the lowly Portable Bed, to the Bane of Static, a sword that lets you smite your enemies, this mod is guaranteed to leave you waiting for more.

 

It also includes trinkets that can help you in various different ways, including:

  • Keeping your items on death with the Crystal of Binding
  • Reducing damage taken when ender pearling with the fabled Dimensional Stabilizer

 

Other Features:

  • Moon Boots, that give the wearer jump boost
  • The Aqua Breather, giving the wearer the ability to breathe underwater!
  • The Pickaxe of Duality,  which once enchanted with Fortune or Silk Touch, allows you to swap freely between the two!

 

Images and Videos

A few of the items in the mod

The Creative Tab

 

 

 

I recommend JEI or an Equivalent for the recipes

 

Thank you to anyone who enjoys this mod!
